strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder of an open-source geospatial platform demonstrating end-to-end ownership
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Title history is Senior/Staff IC rather than Principal or Director-level scope
Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth — no shipped AI products, platforms, or research credentials
No advanced degree and no documented experience advising strategic customers or partners at executive scale

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and shipped AI products
Years of engineering experience across diverse stacks
Director-level IC scope and external thought leadership

response.justification: The candidate brings substantial hands-on engineering breadth over 15+ years with founder experience and emerging exposure to AI-agent tooling, but the profile aligns more with a senior/staff full-stack engineer than a Director-level Principal focused on AI strategy. Evidence of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI platforms, and advising strategic customers on cutting-edge cloud/AI adoption is limited relative to the role's expectations.
